high.title: Possible committed secret or private key
high.recommendation: Remove the secret from Git history if confirmed, rotate it, and keep only documented placeholder values in examples.

high.title: Possible public database credential
high.recommendation: Move credentials to deployment environment variables and rotate exposed values if real.

high.title: Possible untrusted code execution without sandbox evidence
high.recommendation: Disable the feature or isolate it in a separate sandboxed worker with strict resource limits.

medium.title: Environment example file not found
medium.recommendation: Add .env.example with placeholder values and explain each required variable.

medium.title: No public API rate-limit evidence found
medium.recommendation: Add per-IP or per-user limits for login, write, AI, and expensive endpoints.

medium.title: Security CI gates not found
medium.recommendation: Add dependency audit, static analysis, and secret scanning workflows.

medium.title: Potentially broad CORS policy
medium.recommendation: Restrict allowed origins, methods, and headers to known production clients.

low.title: LICENSE file not found
low.recommendation: Add a LICENSE file so users and contributors understand usage rights.

low.title: README setup information appears incomplete
low.recommendation: Add quick start, requirements, env vars, build, test, and deployment sections.

low.title: CHANGELOG not found
low.recommendation: Add a changelog if releases are expected to be consumed by users or contributors.
